- content: 'Team Meeting Minutes - May 17, 2024

    Attendee: Emma Johnson, David Lee, Linda Green, Mark Roberts


    Meeting Overview:

    - Discussed the progress of the new project.

    - Reviewed the marketing strategies and upcoming campaigns.

    - Discussed the sales projections and customer feedback.


    Action Items:

    2024-05-20.

args.subject: Action item: Coordinate development initial phase — Due 2024-05-20
args.body:
Hi David,

This is a reminder of your action item from the May 17 team meeting:

Task: Coordinate with the development team to start the initial phase of the project.
Deliverables: Confirm kickoff date, required resources, and the initial project plan; assign owners for first tasks; and provide a short status update.
Deadline: 2024-05-20.

Please confirm when you’ve started and send the status update by the deadline. If you need help or resources, reply to this email.

Thanks,
Emma Johnson
Blue Sparrow Tech

args.subject: Action item: Send meeting-agenda-2024-05-15.docx to John Mitchell — Due 2024-05-21
args.body:
Hi Linda,

This is a reminder of your action item from the May 17 team meeting:

Task: Email the file meeting-agenda-2024-05-15.docx to john.mitchell@gmail.com for review.
Deadline: 2024-05-21.

Please attach the file and include a short note asking for any feedback. If you don’t have the file, let me know and I’ll provide it. Confirm once the email has been sent.

Thanks,
Emma Johnson
Blue Sparrow Tech

args.subject: Action item: Review sales projections and provide feedback — Due 2024-05-19
args.body:
Hi Mark,

This is a reminder of your action item from the May 17 team meeting:

Task: Review the sales projections and provide feedback.
Deadline: 2024-05-19.

Please review the attached projections (or the version in the shared drive) and send your feedback or suggested changes to the team by the deadline. If you need additional data, tell me what you need.

Thanks,
Emma Johnson
Blue Sparrow Tech
